# Repository Labels

Recommended labels for MaxPost issues and pull requests.

| Label | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `bug` | Confirmed or suspected defect |
| `enhancement` | Focused product improvement |
| `documentation` | Documentation-only change |
| `design` | Brand, UI, UX or design-system work |
| `website` | Public website work |
| `wordpress-theme` | `maxpost-theme` work |
| `maxpost-core` | Core plugin and platform logic |
| `desktop` | Windows application work |
| `api` | REST API contract or implementation |
| `security` | Security-sensitive work |
| `performance` | Performance improvement |
| `accessibility` | Accessibility improvement |
| `good first issue` | Small, clearly scoped task |
| `help wanted` | External contribution is useful |
| `blocked` | Waiting on another task or decision |
| `needs decision` | Product or architecture decision required |

Labels should describe the work, not the person doing it. Avoid duplicate labels with overlapping meaning.
